evidence_summary: Establish the protagonist's transition from grief-stricken passivity to decisive action through a sudden mental epiphany. The visual language must shift from lethargic despair to high-contrast clarity as the nine thought waves are realized.
As Dejah Thoris slips into a coma, John Carter experiences a sudden, intense mental breakthrough. He recalls nine specific "thought waves" that act as the keys to the atmosphere plant's locks.
Heavy atmosphere of despair; Dejah Thoris losing consciousness.
Intense resolve; John Carter possesses the nine keys to the atmosphere plant.
The mental realization of nine specific thought waves.
